_comment: Curated HIGHLIGHT models shown under the 'mChatAI Cloud — auto' row in the harness pin ladder — NOT the full Cloud catalog (that's the chat model picker / a future Browse-all button). mChatAI Cloud routes to these via the compute-proxy on the user's token balance (no per-provider signup). Adding a highlight = content PR, zero rebuild. A PAID slug (e.g. z-ai/glm-5.2) ALSO needs the compute-proxy PAID_PASSTHROUGH_ALLOWLIST env + a matching cloud/cloud-model-exposure.json curatedOpenRouter entry (so the chat picker and the ladder agree). NOTE: do NOT add :free slugs here until the cloudReady predicate understands free-call quota (today it requires a positive token balance) and the model is also added to cloud-model-exposure.json — otherwise it shows but can't route.
